/usr/bin/ar qc libcnn.a CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/activation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/bootstrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/conv2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/linear.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cnn.dir/src/cnn/pool.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcnn.a
